[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011000 2
1 1100111 5
2 0100110 3
3 1111110 6
4 1111101 6
5 0101001 3
6 0000100 1
7 1111101 6

12 21 1111111 a

67 76 1111111 a
